summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TratorShop onboarding functionality. All requested features are working perfectly: /onboarding page exists with two clear options, users without completed onboarding are redirected appropriately, individual and dealer account types are saved correctly with proper limits, and all navigation flows work as expected.
passed_tests: Backend: User registration and login API working correctly
Backend: GET /api/user/profile returns onboarding status correctly
Backend: POST /api/user/onboarding (individual) saves account_type='individual', max_listings=3
Backend: POST /api/user/onboarding (dealer) saves account_type='dealer', creates dealer_profile
Backend: Onboarding validation rejects invalid account types
Backend: Dealer onboarding requires store_name field
Frontend: /onboarding page loads with correct test IDs
Frontend: Page displays 'Como deseja anunciar?' question
Frontend: Individual option shows 'Anúncio Único' with 'Até 3 anúncios' and 'Grátis'
Frontend: Dealer option shows 'Lojista / Revendedor' with 'Até 10 anúncios' and 'Página exclusiva da loja'
Frontend: New users redirected to /onboarding after registration
Frontend: Individual selection works and submit button appears
Frontend: After individual onboarding completion, user redirected to /dashboard
Frontend: Dashboard shows correct listing limits (0/3 for individual)
Frontend: Users without onboarding_complete=true redirected from /anunciar to /onboarding
Integration: Full user flow registration → onboarding → dashboard works
Integration: Access control prevents unauthenticated access to onboarding
Integration: Access control prevents incomplete onboarding users from accessing /anunciar
Integration: Onboarding data persists correctly in database
Integration: UI reflects backend data correctly

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (Onboarding page, navigation, and UI working correctly)
success_percentage.onboarding_flow: 100% (Complete user journey from registration to dashboard)
success_percentage.access_control: 100% (Proper redirects for users without completed onboarding)
